tables.title: Irradiation vs External vs Internal Contamination
rows: Was in a radiation field (like an X-ray)
Minimal to others; medical concern for patient
Medical management; specialist involvement; KI if radioiodine

tables.title: Responder Radiation Protection: Time, Distance, Shielding
rows: Work efficiently; rotate responders; minimize time near source
Dose falls with the inverse square of distance
Step back; keep the maximum practical distance from the source
Use walls, vehicles, or earth between you and the source

tables.title: Acute Radiation Syndrome by Increasing Dose
rows: Falling blood counts → infection, bleeding (lowest ARS doses)
